Query.Sql: with COSD as ( select distinct Record ->> '$.LinkagePatientId.NhsNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber, -- Date of the diagnostic procedure unnest ([[Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures.DiagnosticProcedureDate'], Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures[*].DiagnosticProcedureDate'], recursive := true) as DiagnosticProcedureDate, -- The SNOMED CT concept ID used to identify the diagnostic procedure unnest ([[Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures.DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt.@code'], Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures[*].DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt.@code'], recursive := true) as DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt from omop_staging.cosd_staging_901 where type = 'SK' ) select distinct NhsNumber, DiagnosticProcedureDate, DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt from COSD where NhsNumber is not null and DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt is not null;

Explanation.Description: NHS Number data element, the primary identifier for a person within the NHS.
Procedure date of the diagnostic procedure. Will be mapped to procedure_date in OMOP. Currently in string format (CCYY-MM-DD) and will be cast to a date type in a later ETL step.

The SNOMED CT concept ID used to identify the diagnostic procedure. Will be mapped to procedure_source_value and used to derive procedure_concept_id via SNOMED-to-OMOP concept mapping in a later ETL step.
